c.d: How effectively the app implements shuffle mode including features like true randomization, prevention of repeated songs, and intelligent shuffling
c.s: Google Play Store, YouTube, Community forums

c.d: Ability to create, manage, and sync playlists and folders for easy playback on shuffle
Support for streaming music from cloud services or online platforms within shuffle mode
Popularity indicators such as number of downloads and average user ratings to reflect reliability and user satisfaction
Availability of the app on multiple platforms (Android, iOS, desktop) facilitating shuffle mode across devices
